kernel_funcs
============

.. py:module:: kernel_funcs


Classes
-------

.. autoapisummary::

   kernel_funcs.KernelFactory

---------

.. autoapisummary::

   kernel_funcs.matern_kernel_builder


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:function:: matern_kernel_builder(nu)

.. py:class:: KernelFactory(dim, normalize, differences_by_dim, n_order, true_noise_std=None)

   
   Factory for generating different kernel functions (SE, RQ, SineExp, Matérn)
   in isotropic and anisotropic forms.

   .. attribute:: dim

      Dimensionality of the input space.

      :type: int

   .. attribute:: normalize

      Whether to normalize inputs (scaling differences to [-3, 3]).

      :type: bool

   .. attribute:: differences_by_dim

      Pairwise differences between input points, by dimension.

      :type: list of arrays

   .. attribute:: true_noise_std

      Known noise standard deviation (for adjusting noise bounds).

      :type: float, optional

   .. attribute:: bounds

      Hyperparameter bounds (log10 space).

      :type: list of tuples

   .. attribute:: nu

      Smoothness parameter for the Matérn kernel.

      :type: float

   .. attribute:: n_order

      Order of derivatives for kernel smoothness.

      :type: int















   ..
       !! processed by numpydoc !!

   .. py:attribute:: dim


   .. py:attribute:: normalize


   .. py:attribute:: differences_by_dim


   .. py:attribute:: true_noise_std
      :value: None



   .. py:attribute:: bounds
      :value: []



   .. py:attribute:: nu


   .. py:attribute:: n_order


   .. py:method:: get_bounds_from_data()

      
      Computes bounds for hyperparameters based on the observed data range.
















      ..
          !! processed by numpydoc !!


   .. py:method:: create_kernel(kernel_name, kernel_type)

      
      Returns a kernel function based on specified name and type.

      :param kernel_name: Name of the kernel ('SE', 'RQ', 'SineExp', 'Matern').
      :type kernel_name: str
      :param kernel_type: Type of kernel ('anisotropic' or 'isotropic').
      :type kernel_type: str

      :returns: The selected kernel function.
      :rtype: callable















      ..
          !! processed by numpydoc !!


   .. py:method:: _create_anisotropic(kernel)

      
      Sets bounds and returns the anisotropic kernel function.
















      ..
          !! processed by numpydoc !!


   .. py:method:: _create_isotropic(kernel)

      
      Sets bounds and returns the isotropic kernel function.
















      ..
          !! processed by numpydoc !!


   .. py:method:: _add_bounds(extra_bounds)

      
      Adds hyperparameter bounds, adjusting for normalization.
















      ..
          !! processed by numpydoc !!


   .. py:method:: se_kernel_anisotropic(differences_by_dim, length_scales, index=-1)

      
      Anisotropic Squared Exponential (SE) kernel.
















      ..
          !! processed by numpydoc !!


   .. py:method:: rq_kernel_anisotropic(differences_by_dim, length_scales, index=-1)

      
      Anisotropic Rational Quadratic (RQ) kernel.
















      ..
          !! processed by numpydoc !!


   .. py:method:: sine_exp_kernel_anisotropic(differences_by_dim, length_scales, index=-1)

      
      Anisotropic Sine-Exponential kernel.
















      ..
          !! processed by numpydoc !!


   .. py:method:: matern_kernel_anisotropic(differences_by_dim, length_scales, index=-1)

      
      Anisotropic Matérn kernel (half-integer ν).
















      ..
          !! processed by numpydoc !!


   .. py:method:: se_kernel_isotropic(differences_by_dim, length_scales, index=-1)

      
      Isotropic Squared Exponential (SE) kernel.
















      ..
          !! processed by numpydoc !!


   .. py:method:: rq_kernel_isotropic(differences_by_dim, length_scales, index=-1)

      
      Isotropic Rational Quadratic (RQ) kernel.

          !! processed by numpydoc !!


   .. py:method:: sine_exp_kernel_isotropic(differences_by_dim, length_scales, index=-1)

      
      Isotropic Sine-Exponential kernel.

          !! processed by numpydoc !!


   .. py:method:: metern_kernel_isotropic(differences_by_dim, length_scales, index=-1)

      
      Isotropic Matérn kernel (half-integer ν).
